content:
Every site we ship starts from the same baseline: semantic landmarks, a strict heading order, and visible focus on every interactive element. That foundation means an audit rarely turns up surprises late in the build.

We test with a keyboard first and a screen reader second, then run automated checks in CI so regressions never reach production. The result is a site that works for everyone and passes WCAG 2.2 AA without a last-minute scramble.
